title: SVA: named property not working in latest/devel version?
body:
Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)

> Trying sv-tests:  tests/chapter-16/16.15--property-disable-iff.sv

```log
%Error: /home/srini/proj/git_sv-tests/sv-tests/tests/chapter-16/16.15--property-disable-iff.sv:34:27: Unsupported in C: Variable has the same name as PROPERTY 'prop': 'prop'
```

I did a bit more digging as to how the runners.py seems to work fine on this example, and below is what I found. I could be wrong, am new to this repo.

I see that the top module is passed as "clk_gen" (by its default module search algorithm).
> --top-module clk_gen

So my wild guess is that it hides that named property issue in module top. I hacked it a bit to have module top as first in the file, then I see this issue.


What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

> Verilator 5.005 devel rev v5.004-61-ga1160a85a

What OS and distribution are you using?
> Windows 10, WSL, Ubuntu
